1
Read Facebook’s advertising terms of service at least once a month as an
active media buyer. They change A LOT!
Facebook has a new ad review process where you can get feedback on
any changes needed to your ad to get it approved…
Here’s what to do if it’s not approved…
MODULE 4
SUMMARY NOTES

2
Module 4 Summary Notes
Please review to ensure you aren’t promoting restricted content on the
platform.
Personal attributes are one of the most common reasons that advertiser’s
ads are not approved. Please ensure your ad copy and creative are not
calling people out based off of personal attributes...
